title: الصحة النفسية في الثقافة الخليجية
citation: Ghuloum, S., Bener, A., & Bhugra, D.K. (2010). Prevalence of common mental disorders in adult population attending primary health care setting in Doha, Qatar. Iranian Journal of Psychiatry, 5(2), 78-82.
content: [CONTENT AUTHOR REQUIRED] Gulf Arabic adaptation (~450 words) — this is the primary home-language expression of this article. Cover: family-centred identity, faith as coping, stigma decreasing across GCC, UAE context, seeking help as strength. Khaleeji register.
